category_sources: Official documentation says Serd is a lightweight C library and command-line utilities for RDF data in Turtle, NTriples, NQuads, and TriG formats.
source_facts.description says C library for RDF syntax.
docs_sources: Official Drobilla Serd Sphinx documentation covers getting started, command-line tools, API, and data model.
repo_sources: Official GitLab project page describes serd as a lightweight C library for RDF.
Official Serd documentation gives the git checkout URL https://gitlab.com/drobilla/serd.git.
tags_sources: Official GitLab topics include linked-data, semantic-web, Turtle, NTriples, TriG, and NQuads.
source_facts.description identifies a C library for RDF syntax.
